title: Detroit Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Detroit, with a Z-Score of -3.71. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Detroit are characterized by a high level of humidity, at 76%, and moderate winds of 7.7 km/h.
 The cold snap is expected to have a significant impact on various sectors, with 14.0 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD) and no Cooling Degree Days (CDD).
 The city's infrastructure and daily activities may be disrupted due to the extreme cold, with potential consequences for the local economy and population.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
